burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; high caregiver anxiety and ED utilization

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Seizure with fever in 6-60 months without CNS infection or prior afebrile seizures

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with parental education and acute management

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in emergency and pediatric services; exclude meningitis when indicated
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care, antipyretics; benzodiazepines for prolonged seizures
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Delayed presentation and limited access to emergency care in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Clear clinical guidelines and effective acute management
